title: KAHEIGN 6Pcs Stainless Steel Cups with Lids & Straws, 360ml Unbreakable Kids Tumbler Reusable Drinking Cup Travel Mug Iced Coffee Cup with Removable Silicone Sleeves for Adults Kids Cold Hot Drinks
features: [High quality] Made of high-quality 304 stainless steel and silicone, BPA-free and food-grade, non-toxic and odorless, will not deform and rust, unbreakable that can withstand multiple bumps and accidental drops

[Leakproof lid] The plastic lid is 100% leakproof when sealed, water will not spill out; 2Pcs drinking holes on the lid top, can sip directly or use the straw; The locking latch can be folded to avoid hitting when drinking

[Easy to use] Come with 6 different bright colors silicone cover (yellow, orange, purple, blue, red, green), non-slip and heat-insulated, to protect hands from hot or cold drinks, different color designs allow to identify own cups

[Size] Cup top: 9cm, bottom: 5.5cm, height: 11cm, capacity: 12oz /360ml, straw length: 16.5cm, all parts are dishwasher safe for quick and thorough cleaning; The stackable design is easier to store and save space

[Applicable] Suitable for hot or cold water, tea, coffee, milk, juice, ice cream, etc., can be used for parties, travel, camping, picnics, barbecues and many other occasions! Comes with 2 straw brushes for cleaning straw
description: Product Description KAHEIGN 6Pcs 360ml Unbreakable Stainless Steel Cups with Lids & Straws KAHEIGN 6Pcs 360ml Unbreakable Stainless Steel Cups with Lids & Straws Days need vibrant colors to light up our life, our stainless steel tumblers come in 6 different bright colored silicone sleeves to make your family members or friends to identify their own cups. The cups will not only make your kids love drinking water, but also decorate your kitchen. And with the lid sealed, the tumbler are 100% leak proof, there's no worry for your children to make a mess by spill the bevarage everywhere. And the kids drinking cups can be taken to everywhere, like preschool, travelling, camping, biking,office... Grab and go from home to work, to make your life more convenient. With the premium quality and esthetically pleasing appearance, makes the stainless steel cups a decent gift for any occasion like birthday, party, Mother's Day, Father's Day, New Year, Christmas, Halloween. Material: Stainless Steel+Silicone Package Include: kids cups*6; straws*6; lids*6; sleeves*6; straw brushes*2 Capacity: 360ml=12oz/cup Color: red, yellow, orange, purple, blue, green VERSATILE USE The stainless steel tumbler can be used for hot & cold drinks as well as snacks, the insulated silicone sleeves will protect your hand from super hot or super cold beverage. The stainless steel cups can also be used for water, milk, beer, juice, hot chocolate, smoothie, cocktail... one set for whole family use. Colorful Sleeves and Stackable Cups We have upgraded the sleeves to wrap most of the surface of stainless steel tumblers for better protection of your hand, especially when you are using it for hot chocolate. The different colors will help your kiddo to identify their own cups, make them fall in love of drinking water. And the straw cups are stackable to save space for easier storage. Leak Proof & Multipurpose Use Lid The lids of our spill proof kid cups have multiple way to use, can be used for sipping, and they are also straw friendly. And when the lid is sealed, the sippy cups is 100% leak proof. THREE WAYS OF USING SHINEME STAINLESS STEEL KIDS CUPS
